name: raycast-whisper-input
title: Whisper Voice Input
description: Real-time voice-to-text input using local Whisper. Speak and see text appear instantly, then paste it anywhere.
author: yutaakase

preferences.name: modelSize
preferences.title: Whisper Model
preferences.description: Choose the Whisper model size. Smaller = faster, larger = more accurate.

preferences.name: ffmpegPath
preferences.title: ffmpeg Path
preferences.description: Path to ffmpeg binary. Leave empty to auto-detect.

preferences.name: ollamaModel
preferences.title: Ollama Model
preferences.description: Ollama model for text refinement. Leave empty to disable.

commands.name: voice-input
commands.title: Voice Input
commands.subtitle: Whisper
commands.description: Start real-time voice input. Speak and press Enter to paste text at cursor.

commands.name: setup
commands.title: Setup Whisper
commands.subtitle: Whisper
commands.description: Download Whisper model and verify dependencies.
